steps.title: Identify the contrast between original and current distribution
steps.content: The passage opens with though, signaling opposition between how the game was originally distributed and its current status. The game was created anonymously as a political protest, so the original distribution must have been covert—the opposite of “now readily available.”

steps.title: Select the word that fits the contrast
steps.content:
Surreptitiously means distributed secretly or stealthily—exactly how protest materials would be shared against an authoritarian regime.

The other three don't match: disingenuously suggests insincerity, succinctly refers to brief expression, and dispassionately means emotionless.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
